training_data_statement: Model trained only on public Poker44 benchmark releaseVersion v1.13 through sourceDate 2026-07-08; live-sized training uses 70-110 hand same-date/same-label units across multiple merge seeds, within-batch behavioural features, served rank-cap official reward selection, miner-visible payload fields only, and unlabeled forward-audit payloads only for shape checks; no validator-private labels.
